# Required files for myHarness (M8' plugin 化后)
# Sourced by .github/workflows/lint.yml (structure-check) and
# .github/workflows/scheduled.yml (daily-structure-audit).
#
# Rules:
#   - one file path per line, relative to repo root
#   - blank lines and lines starting with '#' are ignored
#   - any missing entry fails CI (lint.yml) and opens an issue (scheduled.yml)
#
# When adding a new file:
#   1. Add the path here (alphabetical within its section is nice but not required)
#   2. Commit alongside the file it lists
#   3. No workflow edit needed — both workflows read this file
#
# 注：ADR-0006 已实施。原 .claude/{agents,commands,hooks,rules,scripts}/* 资产
# 由 plugin/ 提供，本清单不再列。.claude/settings.json 保留作为项目级配置占位。

# --- Root manifests ---
CLAUDE.md
README.md
AGENTS.md
CHANGELOG.md
.gitignore
.env.example
.mcp.json
package.json
.prettierrc.json
.tool-versions

# --- Project-level Claude Code config ---
.claude/settings.json

# --- Docs ---
docs/AGENTS.backend.md
docs/roadmap.md
docs/memory-conventions.md
docs/loop-architecture.md
docs/periodic-tasks.md
docs/context-management.md
docs/tools-fallback.md
docs/agent-output-schema.md
docs/adr/README.md

# --- CI ---
.github/workflows/lint.yml
.github/workflows/scheduled.yml
.github/workflows/plugin-validate.yml
.github/required-files.txt

# --- Plugin manifest (M8' plugin 化产物，由 plugin-validate.yml 校验) ---
plugin/.claude-plugin/plugin.json
plugin/hooks/hooks.json
plugin/.mcp.json
plugin/.env.example
plugin/skills/harness-guidelines/SKILL.md
plugin/README.md

# --- Dev tooling ---
scripts/dev.sh
